mainEntity.name: Why Occupational Illness Claims Get Denied So Often
mainEntity.text: Why Occupational Illness Claims Get Denied So Often

acceptedAnswer.text: Why do insurance companies fight occupational illness claims? Usually, they argue your sickness is just part of getting older or happened outside of work. To win, you need a rock-solid link between your environment and your diagnosis. If they're playing games with your benefits, it's time to let an expert step in and push back for you.
